* Konkurrenskraftig lön och förmåner
* Generöst friskvårdsbidrag
* Hybrid arbetsplats
* Årlig konferensresa utomlands
* Möjlighet att vara med från start och aktivt bidra till uppbyggnaden av företaget

**Placering:** Göteborg

**Ansökan**


För att söka Jappas uppdrag behöver du skapa en profil i vår plattform.


Lägg 10–15 minuter på att skapa din profil idag och öppna dörren till nya, spännande möjligheter.

**Jappa – en vassare väg till uppdrag inom e-handel och tech.**

 **Ansökan**


För att söka Jappas uppdrag behöver du skapa en profil i vår plattform.


Lägg 10–15 minuter på att skapa din profil idag och öppna dörren till nya, spännande möjligheter.

### **Om Jappa**

 **Jappa – en vassare väg till uppdrag inom e-handel och tech.**  

  

Vi har ersatt gammelmäklare med en smart marknadsplats, branschkunskap, kvalitetssäkrade processer och AI. Resultatet är tydligare matchningar, snabbare besked och nöjdare både konsulter och kunder.


Med Jappa blir det enkelt att hitta rätt uppdrag. Hos oss får du tillgång till en bred mix av möjligheter inom IT, e-handel och tech – allt från kortare frilansuppdrag till längre engagemang och rekryteringar.


Jappa är en talent-as-a-service-lösning där du som konsult står i centrum. Vi strävar alltid efter att matcha dig med uppdrag där du verkligen kan göra skillnad och utvecklas.

title: Senior Embedded Test Engineer
description:
We are looking for an experienced Senior Test Automation Engineer with strong expertise in embedded systems software testing, test strategy definition, and automated test framework architecture.
   

 This role is a key specialist position focused on establishing robust testing methodologies, scalable automation solutions, and long-term quality assurance strategies for complex embedded software environments.
   

 The consultant will support development teams in ensuring high software quality, efficient test processes, and continuous improvements within testing and automation.
   

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

 Responsibilities
   

 • Develop and maintain test strategies for embedded software testing
   

 • Define test scope, test plans, and test cases based on requirements and risks
   

 • Design and implement scalable automated test frameworks
   

 • Develop automated tests using tools and languages such as Python and Robot Framework
   

 • Perform software testing in embedded environments
   

 • Troubleshoot and analyze issues identified during testing
   

 • Support CI/CD integration and continuous testing
   

 • Drive improvements in test processes and quality assurance
   

 • Act as a specialist advisor to development teams on testing architecture and automation strategy
   

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

 Required Qualifications
   

 • Minimum 5 years of experience in embedded software testing
   

 • Strong experience in test strategy and test automation
   

 • Experience with scripting/programming languages such as Python
   

 • Hands-on experience with Robot Framework
   

 • Experience with automated testing and test framework development
   

 • Good understanding of embedded systems and software validation
   

 • Good knowledge of Git and version control workflows
   

 • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and continuous testing practices
   

 • Experience working in Linux-based development and test environments
   

 • Experience working in agile environments
   

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

 Personal Attributes
   

 • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
   

 • Structured and quality-focused
   

 • Excellent communication and collaboration skills
   

 • Self-driven and proactive
   

  

  

  

 Assignment in Järfälla. Working from home, maximum 1 day a week if applicable tasks.

title: Qlik Consultant
description:
På B3 Indes förvandlar vi data till värdefulla insikter som driver förändring och innovation. Vi skapar lösningar inom AI, Business Intelligence, Data Science och Automation för att maximera värdet av data och stärka företags konkurrenskraft. Vår styrka ligger i att kombinera passion för AI och data med en stark laganda, där vi stöttar varandra och löser utmaningar tillsammans.
   

  

****Rollen s** 
 om konsult inom Qlik på B3:**
 Hos oss får du chansen att jobba med några av Sveriges mest spännande kunder och projekt. Vad innebär det? Jo, att du får:
   

  

* Gräva i data och hitta insikter som inte bara hjälper våra kunder – utan kanske till och med gör världen lite bättre.
* Göra företag mer datadrivna och smartare genom att guida dem i rätt riktning.
* Utforma effektiva visualiseringar som våra kunder kan agera på.
* Bygga och implementera avancerade lösningar – och faktiskt se dem göra skillnad!


 Här handlar det inte bara om teknik – det handlar om att modellera, tillgängliggöra och visualisera data som kan skapa verklig förändring. Vi gillar att tänka stort, experimentera och lösa kluriga problem tillsammans. Och det bästa? Du får ett team av grymma kollegor att bolla idéer med, lära dig av och ha kul ihop med!
   

  

****Det är din passion för** 
 data och analys som gör skillnaden. Utöver det ser vi gärna:**
* Har du en relevant universitetsutbildning? Toppen! Har du kanske skaffat motsvarande kunskaper genom arbetslivserfarenhet? Det funkar lika bra!
* Minst 4 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet – vi letar efter någon som har hunnit samla på sig en del erfarenhet inom området.
* Flytande svenska och engelska – eftersom båda språken används dagligen i arbetet.
* Tidigare konsultroller är ett plus! Har du jobbat som konsult tidigare? Då är det en extra merit, men inget krav.


**Men framför allt...**
 Har du djup erfarenhet av Qliks produkter? Toppen – det är viktigt! Men vi lägger också stor vikt vid din förmåga att se helheten och vad som skapar värde, skapa användbara lösningar men framför allt att du är nyfiken. Om du dessutom har koll på:
   

  

* Någon av de vanligaste databaserna och molntjänsterna
* Kanske har du också koll på någon av de andra vanligaste BI-verktygen (ex; Power BI eller Tableau)
* Snowflake och/eller Databricks
* Informationsmodellering och Dimensionsmodellering
* DevOps och Visual Studio.
* Lite Python-erfarenhet skadar inte – det blir allt vanligare


 Är det här ett stort plus!
   

  

**Varför välja B3 Indes?**
 💡
 **Utveckling & karriär** 
 – Väx i en entreprenörsdriven miljö där din kompetens får ta plats.
   

  

 🌿
 **Balans & välmående** 
 – Vi värnar om ditt välbefinnande med stöd för wellness och en flexibel vardag.
   

  

 🚀
 **Energi & gemenskap** 
 – Här präglas kulturen av öppenhet, nyfikenhet och en passion för att skapa något större – tillsammans.
   

  

 ❤️
 **Vi bryr oss – på riktigt** 
 – Vi engagerar oss i samhällsfrågor och samarbetar med initiativ som Suicide Zero, My Dream Now och Pink Programming för att göra skillnad även utanför arbetslivet.
   

  

**En arbetsplats som gör skillnad** 
 :
   

  

 Vi är stolta över att ha utsetts till ett av
 **Sveriges fem främsta karriärföretag 2025** 
 – en utmärkelse som speglar vår energi, nyfikenhet och vårt engagemang för att skapa en inkluderande och inspirerande arbetsplats. Här värdesätts olika perspektiv och idéer, och vi tror att det är just det som gör oss starkare.
   

  

 Hos oss får du friheten att styra över dina uppdrag, din arbetstid och din utveckling. Vi erbjuder
 **konkurrenskraftiga löner** 
 , flexibilitet att forma din vardag och en sund balans mellan jobb och fritid. Och vi vet att
 **gemenskap är minst lika viktigt som teknik** 
 – därför satsar vi på allt från konferensresor och sommarfester till sköna AW:s där vi kan släppa jobbet för en stund.
   

  

**Om B3 Consulting Group**
*B3 Consulting Group är ett expansivt konsultbolag med cirka 1000 medarbetare. Vi brinner för innovation och hjälper Sveriges ledande företag och organisationer att skapa framtidens möjligheter genom digital transformation. B3 finns på*

title: Principal Enterprise Architect
description:
**We help the world run better**  

At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. We're builders touching over 20 industries and 80% of global commerce, and we need your unique talents to help shape what's next. The work is challenging – but it matters. You'll find a place where you can be yourself, prioritize your wellbeing, and truly belong. What's in it for you? Constant learning, skill growth, great benefits, and a team that wants you to grow and succeed. **What you’ll build**
As part of SAP’s Enterprise Architecture team, you will lead customers through their digital transformation journeys — from strategy to execution. You’ll help shape their NorthStar Enterprise Architecture, guide clean core adoption, and translate architectural visions into tangible outcomes through SAP solutions, including the Business Technology Platform (BTP).
You will:* Advise customers on future-proofing their IT landscapes, helping them simplify, modernize, and accelerate innovation.
* Collaboratively develop a capability/application as-is and target the enterprise architecture model based on SAP’s reference industry architecture
* Drive the **Clean Core imperative** by reducing complexity, consolidating systems, and streamlining processes.
* Enable organizations to realize the full value of **SAP BTP** through integration, extensibility, and process optimization.
* Advise and drive AI capability Adoption across the customer organization
* Act as a trusted advisor across business and IT functions, helping customers align technology decisions with strategic business goals.
* Work collaboratively with senior stakeholders to drive adoption and consumption in order to deliver exceptional Cloud Subscription Renewals

 **What you bring**
You are a seasoned professional who combines deep Enterprise Architecture expertise with business acumen and a genuine empathy for customers.**Must-have:*** 10+ years of experience in customer-facing roles (e.g., Enterprise Architect, Consultant, Program Manager, Solution Architect, Customer Advisory,…)
* Track record in helping customers/stakeholders **drive business adoption of technology solutions** in order to unlock tangible business value and maximise consumption
* Proven track record in delivering enterprise business transformations through large-scale application delivery and implementation programs
* Demonstrated **SAP S/4HANA application/functional knowledge** and advising and applying **Clean Core** framework
* Exceptional communication, influencing, and negotiation skills in English, with the ability to engage senior stakeholders across IT and business.
* Ability to operate in large and complex organizations with multiple stakeholders

 **Nice to have:*** Experience using **SAP LeanIX** and **Signavio** to document architectures and business processes.
* Familiarity with **SAP Cloud solutions / Business Capabilities and SAP Business AI**
* Familiarity with BTP Integration Suite / BTP Build
* **Professional Certifications** such as SAP Enterprise Architecture Framework (LeanIX EAM), SAP Certified Professional–Enterprise Architect (P\_SAPEA\_2023), or **TOGAF**.

 **Where you belong**
Join a diverse and passionate team of **SAP Enterprise Architects** driving meaningful digital transformation across industries.  

We collaborate closely with various SAP teams and SAP partners, turning strategy into execution with a focus on innovation and business impact. **Locations:**  

Stockholm, Gothenburg, Helsinki, Oslo or Copenhagen (Kindly only apply for one location)  



**Bring out your best**  

SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
  

  

**We win with inclusion**  

SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.  

  

SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.  

  

For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.  

  

Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.  

  

Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor. **AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**
For information on the responsible use of AI in our recruitment process, please refer to our Guidelines for Ethical Usage of AI in the Recruiting Process.
Please note that any violation of these guidelines may result in disqualification from the hiring process.

title: Founding AI Engineer
description:
### **About the Role**


A fast-growing, seed-stage B2B SaaS startup in the productivity and AI communication space is looking for a **Founding AI Engineer** to join its founding team. You'll help build an AI-native email and meetings product — rethought from the ground up — that understands relationships, takes meeting notes in the background, and drafts context-aware follow-ups in your tone. This is a high-ownership, high-impact role where you'll shape both the technical foundation and the product direction from day one.

### **What You'll Do**

* Design and implement LLM flows for context engineering, prompt design, and tool integrations to power intelligent email experiences.
* Build and optimize cloud infrastructure (GCP) for scalability, performance, and reliability.
* Develop and maintain a custom sync engine engineered for near-instant responsiveness.
* Execute database migrations, performance tuning, and product-focused changes based on highest-impact priorities.
* Iterate rapidly on prototypes and production features to surface relevant user actions and cut through inbox noise.
* Operate as a founding team member — own the most critical problems regardless of domain.
* Contribute to hiring and help grow the team thoughtfully.

### **What We're Looking For**

**Required (dealbreakers):**

* 5+ years of hands-on experience as a software or AI engineer delivering production AI-enabled applications.
* Based in Stockholm, Sweden or willing to relocate and work on-site.
* Proven experience building AI-powered features using Large Language Models (LLMs), including context engineering and tool integration, in production.

**Also required:**

* Experience deploying AI workloads in production cloud environments with monitoring, reliability, and scalability.
* Experience with data pipelines and integrations to support AI features.
* Experience building and shipping production-grade full-stack web applications (frontend and backend) with emphasis on performance and scalability.
* Proficiency with Git, CI/CD practices for AI-enabled software.
* Experience with ML model development, training, evaluation, and deployment in production.

**Nice to have:**

* Strong portfolio of side projects demonstrating AI/ML or related engineering depth.
* Prior fast-paced startup experience or proven ability to operate with high ownership in a rapidly changing environment.
* Founding mentality: comfort with ambiguity, ultra-high ownership, and flexibility across domains.

### **Compensation & Benefits**

* Salary range: $80,000 – $120,000 USD annually.
* Visa sponsorship available.

### **Location**


On-site in **Stockholm, Sweden**. Candidates must be based in Stockholm or willing to relocate. Visa sponsorship is available for the right candidate.

title: Senior Cloud Architect, Field Engineering (GenAI Focus)
description:
**Location**  

Our Senior Cloud Architect, Field Engineering (GenAI Focus) will be an integral part of our global Forward Deployment Engineering team. This role is based remotely in the he UK, Ireland, Estonia, Sweden, the Netherlands, and Israel. The job is also open to contractors in Eastern Europe or Portugal.


**About DoiT**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage public cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state—from planning to production.



Delivering **DoiT Cloud Intelligence**, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency. With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

We are hiring a Senior Cloud Architect to strengthen our AWS-focused AI Field Engineering capability inside Customer Experience. This is a customer-facing, delivery-heavy role focused on GenAI advisory and implementation engagements, business value assessment engagements, AWS-funded adoption programs, and complex technical adoption projects that help customers move from exploration to production outcomes.



This role is designed as a more clearly defined Field Engineering job within the existing organization, not as a separate standalone team. The goal is to add focused AI delivery capacity, reduce single-person dependency risk, and scale repeatable customer outcomes through better execution, enablement, and feedback into the wider Field Engineering motion.



You will contribute directly to the four Field Engineering growth pillars: product adoption, partner leadership, new logo acquisition, and install base expansion.



To support your success, you'll have access to structured enablement programs, delivery playbooks, and reusable technical assets built by the team to accelerate your ramp and delivery effectiveness.


**What You Will Do**



1. Deliver high-impact AI engagements


* Lead hands-on delivery for GenAI implementation engagements, funded implementation projects, technical proof-of-value engagements, and other customer-facing AI initiatives.
* Translate customer goals into practical architectures, implementation plans, and measurable technical outcomes.
* Build, configure, and validate AWS-native AI and data solutions, with emphasis on production-ready architectures and services.
* Own technical execution from discovery through delivery, including design reviews, workshops, implementation support, and executive-ready readouts.
* Step into complex customer situations where technical depth, speed, and credibility are required.


2. Drive outcomes across the four FE growth pillars


* Support product adoption by helping customers implement and integrate DoiT products as part of AI engagements and broader cloud initiatives.
* Contribute to new logo acquisition by using technical consulting, implementation engagements, and proof-of-value work to help open and progress new opportunities.
* Expand the install base by helping existing customers adopt advanced features, launch new workloads, and move to higher-value product and service motions.
* Strengthen partner leadership by collaborating with AWS partner teams, supporting funded programs, and helping DoiT show up as a strategic technical partner in AI-related motions.


3. Turn field work into repeatable plays


* Identify patterns, reusable assets, and "gravel road" solutions that should become standard delivery approaches, playbooks, or product feedback.
* Help move successful one-off customer work into repeatable solution packages, templates, and standardized offerings for the broader team.
* Contribute to standardization of engagement sizing, delivery approach, and technical assets to improve team efficiency over time.


4. Work cross-functionally to close and deliver


* Partner closely with Solution Engineers, Account Managers, Customer Success Managers, Engagement Managers, and partner teams to scope and execute the right work at the right time.
* Provide technical leadership during discovery, planning, handoff, and delivery.
* Help ensure customer engagements are well-scoped, well-documented, and tied to clear success criteria.


5. Operate with discipline


* Maintain clear visibility into active work, risks, dependencies, and next steps.
* Use the team's operating systems and workflows to keep customer engagement data current and measurable.
* Contribute to adoption playbooks, funding workflows, Jira hygiene, and the management cadence needed to scale the Field Engineering model.


**What Good Looks Like**



Success in this role means you are helping Field Engineering scale AI delivery while creating measurable impact across the business. Over time, this role should help DoiT:


* increase delivery capacity for AI work without creating fragile single-threaded dependencies,
* convert more technical engagement into durable product adoption and retention,
* improve technical influence on pipeline and closed-won outcomes,
* and create repeatable AI delivery patterns that scale across regions and partner motions.


**Qualifications**


* Experience in customer-facing cloud architecture, technical consulting, solutions delivery, or field engineering.
* Hands-on experience with AWS in real customer environments.
* Working knowledge of modern AI and GenAI architectures on AWS — particularly Amazon Bedrock (Knowledge Bases, model evaluation, guardrails), retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) patterns with vector databases, and agentic AI design patterns. Familiarity with AWS CDK or similar infrastructure-as-code for deploying AI workloads.
* Ability to move between technical depth and customer-facing communication with ease.
* Experience leading workshops, discovery sessions, implementation activities, or technical POVs.
* Strong judgment in ambiguous environments; able to simplify, prioritize, and move work forward without heavy process overhead.
* Comfortable working across sales, delivery, customer success, product, and partner stakeholders.
* Natural ownership mentality: escalate early, resolve fast, and own the outcome.


**Bonus Points**


* Experience delivering GenAI workshops, technical assessments, or customer implementation engagements.
* Experience with the AWS Migration Acceleration Program (MAP), partner-funded implementation programs, or similar structured cloud adoption programs.
* Experience building reusable technical assets, templates, or playbooks that improved delivery leverage.
* Experience with Amazon SageMaker for MLOps workflows, model monitoring, or custom model deployment.
* Familiarity with agentic AI frameworks (e.g., AgentCore, Strands, or similar orchestration tools).
* Hands-on experience with vector databases (Aurora pgvector, OpenSearch) in production RAG architectures.
* AWS cloud certifications.
* Experience with DoiT products, cloud cost optimization, Kubernetes, data engineering, or platform modernization.


**Why This Role Matters**  

This role helps DoiT meet growing customer demand for AI-focused technical delivery while keeping the work embedded in Field Engineering, close to customers, partners, and revenue motions. It is intentionally designed to deepen delivery strength, improve field leverage, and support the broader Field Engineering strategy across product adoption, new logo growth, install base expansion, and partner leadership.


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.



We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.


What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge, and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.



Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.



We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.

  



Full-time employee benefits include:


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: Chief Revenue Officer
description:
**Chief Revenue Officer** 




  





**Plats: Stockholm** 




**Start: Omgående** 




  






 Är du en kommersiell doer som brinner för tillväxt, försäljning och att bygga starka varumärken? Petgood söker nu en erfaren Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) som vill driva och utveckla vår kommersiella tillväxt till nästa nivå. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ, du ansvarar för att driva försäljning inom både DTC och retail, utveckla vår kommersiella strategi, leda marknadsinitiativ och säkerställa att Petgood fortsätter växa som ett av Nordens mest spännande pet health-varumärken.
 




  





**Om Petgood** 





 Petgood är ett svenskt företag som utvecklar veterinärutvecklat hund- och kattfoder med fokus på hälsa, forskning och hållbarhet. Våra produkter säljs idag både direkt till konsument och via retail, och vi har på kort tid byggt ett av Nordens mest omtalade varumärken inom framtidens pet food.
 




  






 Efter en utmanande period står bolaget idag på en starkare plattform med förbättrade produkter, tydligare positionering och högt engagemang från våra kunder. Nu är fokus tydligt: accelerera försäljningen. Därför söker vi nu en Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) som vill ta ett helhetsansvar för Petgoods kommersiella tillväxt.
 




  





**Om rollen** 





 Som CRO på Petgood ansvarar du för att driva bolagets tillväxt och försäljning framåt, både inom DTC och retail. Du kommer att äga och driva den kommersiella strategin tillsammans med teamet, från övergripande planering till daglig execution och uppföljning. Rollen är både strategisk och operativ och passar dig som älskar tillväxt, högt tempo och att omsätta idéer till resultat.
 





 Du kommer bland annat att:
 



* Ansvara för Petgoods kommersiella strategi och tillväxtplan
* Driva försäljning inom både DTC och retail
* Ansvara för den kommersiella kalendern och kampanjplanering
* Driva dialoger med key accounts och partners
* Arbeta nära performancebyrå kring annonsering, CAC och ROI
* Leda och stötta vår Social Media Manager
* Driva initiativ för nykundsanskaffning, retention och subscriber growth
* Säkerställa tydlig uppföljning av KPI och kommersiella mål
* Identifiera nya tillväxtmöjligheter och kommersiella initiativ



  





**KPI du ansvarar för** 



* Försäljning DTC + retail
* Tillväxt i prenumerationsaffären
* Antal nya kunder
* CAC och ROI
* Kommersiell performance i kampanjer och lanseringar



  





**Vem vi tror att du är** 





 Vi tror att du är en kommersiellt driven person som älskar försäljning, tillväxt och execution.
 





 Du är van vid att arbeta datadrivet, men förstår också vikten av starkt varumärke och kundrelationer. Du gillar att få saker att hända och trivs i en entreprenöriell miljö där tempot är högt och beslutsvägarna korta.
 




  






 Du har sannolikt erfarenhet från:
 



* DTC/e-commerce
* Consumer brands
* Growth eller performance marketing
* Retail/dialog med återförsäljare
* Scale-up eller snabbväxande bolag



  





**Vi tror också att du:** 



* Är extremt resultatorienterad
* Är strukturerad men hands-on
* Har starkt affärsdriv
* Trivs med stort ansvar och högt tempo
* Är trygg i att prioritera och fatta beslut
* Gillar att bygga och utveckla team



  





**Varför Petgood?** 





 Det här är en möjlighet att komma in i ett bolag med starkt engagemang, tydlig produkt-market-fit och stor tillväxtpotential inom en kategori som just nu förändras snabbt.
 





 Hos oss får du:
 



* En nyckelroll med stor påverkan på bolagets framtid
* Möjlighet att bygga och driva Petgoods kommersiella resa framåt
* Arbeta nära VD, grundare och styrelse
* En självständig roll med möjlighet att göra verklig skillnad
* Kontor med attraktivt läge i centrala Stockholm
* Goda möjligheter till professionell utveckling
* Ersättning genom både lön och optioner



  





**Ansökan** 





 Skicka in din ansökan till Pernilla@petgood.com och berätta varför du är rätt person för rollen! Vi utvärderar kandidater löpande och kommer att tillsätta tjänsten så snart vi hittar rätt person.
 





 Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta gärna
 
**pernilla@petgood.com**

title: M365 AI Solution Specialist Stockholm
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Vi söker seniora specialister inom Microsoft 365 och AI Workforce som vill skapa moderna, effektiva arbetsplatser för framtiden!**
 Har du minst fem års erfarenhet som specialist inom Microsoft 365 och vill ta nästa steg i en miljö där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad? Nu söker vi fler seniora kollegor till vårt Modern Workplace-team som vill vara med och forma nästa generations digitala arbetsmiljöer tillsammans med oss på Sopra Steria.
   

  

 Som Microsoft 365 AI Solutions Specialist hos oss arbetar du med att designa, implementera och förvalta strategiska lösningar baserade på Microsoft 365 och relaterade teknologier. Du blir en del av ett kunnigt, inkluderande och engagerat team som drivs av samarbete, nyfikenhet och viljan att skapa verklig nytta och värde för våra kunder.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en innovativ arbetsmiljö med spännande uppdrag där din erfarenhet, dina idéer och din tekniska höjd blir viktiga för att ta våra leveranser till nästa nivå.
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som**
* Har minst 5 års erfarenhet som specialist eller arkitekt inom Microsoft 365 – du är trygg i din kompetens och van att guida kunder.
* Har arbetat med SharePoint (online och on premise), Microsoft 365, Power Platform och gärna även Azure.
* Är van vid att arbeta i både svenska och internationella miljöer – du behärskar svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift.
* Har ett starkt konsultmässigt mindset – du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och gillar att jobba nära kund.


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du**
* Tidigare arbetat som konsult.
* Har erfarenhet av arkitektur eller utveckling inom SharePoint eller Power Platform.
* Har erfarenhet och intresse av Co-pilot.


**Att jobba på Sopra Steria**
 Hos oss får du ett stabilt bolag med stora kunder och resurser, i kombination med entreprenörsanda och stark teamkänsla. Vi erbjuder utmanande uppdrag där du kan bidra tekniskt för att göra skillnad i samhället. Med kollektivavtal, marknadsmässiga löner, flexibilitet och en kultur präglad av kunskapsdelning och samarbete vill vi ge dig riktigt bra förutsättningar för att lyckas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

**Ansök nu – vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!**
 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen består av tre intervjuer, personlighet- och logiktest, referenstagning och bakgrundskontroll. Denna kombination av urvalsmetoder ger oss en bredare och mer rättvis bild av dig som kandidat, samtidigt som det säkerställer att både dina tekniska och personliga styrkor kommer till sin rätt. För dig som kandidat innebär det en möjlighet att visa din kompetens och potential från flera perspektiv.
   

  

 Har du frågor? Hör av dig till:
   

  

**Theresia Wiclander** 
 , Talent Acquisition Partner: theresia.wiclander@soprasteria.com
   

  

 Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.

**Where you belong**
 Join a diverse and passionate team of
 **SAP Enterprise Architects**

 We collaborate closely with various SAP teams and SAP partners, turning strategy into execution with a focus on innovation and business impact.
   

  

**Locations:**
 Stockholm, Gothenburg, Helsinki, Oslo or Copenhagen (Kindly only apply for one location)
   

  

**Bring out your best**
 SAP innovations help more than four hundred thousand customers worldwide work together more efficiently and use business insight more effectively. Originally known for leadership in enterprise resource planning (ERP) software, SAP has evolved to become a market leader in end-to-end business application software and related services for database, analytics, intelligent technologies, and experience management. As a cloud company with two hundred million users and more than one hundred thousand employees worldwide, we are purpose-driven and future-focused, with a highly collaborative team ethic and commitment to personal development. Whether connecting global industries, people, or platforms, we help ensure every challenge gets the solution it deserves. At SAP, you can bring out your best.
   

  

**We win with inclusion**
 SAP’s culture of inclusion, focus on health and well-being, and flexible working models help ensure that everyone – regardless of background – feels included and can run at their best. At SAP, we believe we are made stronger by the unique capabilities and qualities that each person brings to our company, and we invest in our employees to inspire confidence and help everyone realize their full potential. We ultimately believe in unleashing all talent and creating a better world.
   

  

 SAP is committed to the values of Equal Employment Opportunity and provides accessibility accommodations to applicants with physical and/or mental disabilities. If you are interested in applying for employment with SAP and are in need of accommodation or special assistance to navigate our website or to complete your application, please send an e-mail with your request to Recruiting Operations Team: Careers@sap.com.
   

  

 For SAP employees: Only permanent roles are eligible for the SAP Employee Referral Program, according to the eligibility rules set in the SAP Referral Policy. Specific conditions may apply for roles in Vocational Training.
   

  

 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to their age, race, religion, national origin, ethnicity, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, et al), sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, protected veteran status, or disability, in compliance with applicable federal, state, and local legal requirements.
   

  

 Successful candidates might be required to undergo a background verification with an external vendor.
   

  

**AI Usage in the Recruitment Process**

title: Sales Engineer- Nordics
description:
**Sales Engineer - Nordics**
 Radware is a global leader in cyber security and application delivery solutions for physical, cloud, and software-defined data centers.
   

  

 At Radware, we live and breathe cybersecurity. It is our passion. Each day, our international team works to earn the trust of more than thousands of organizations around the globe. Keeping them safe is our mission. To that end, we go head-to-head with politically motivated hacktivists, dangerous nation-state threat actors and other notorious cyber attackers — these are not your average adversaries. Backed by nearly 30 years of experience, Radware is best known for its technical excellence and innovative network and application security solutions. That is why it is so important that we build our team with bold and bright talent.
   

  

 At Radware, we fight for the good guys to protect customers from the increasing sophistication, volume, and severity of cyber security breaches. In any increasingly challenging threat landscape, customers need specialist skills to protect their digital assets and We provide innovative technology and Cloud Services to guarantee the continuity and security of the online digital experience.
   

  

****What is the job:****
**We are looking for a highly motivated Sales Engineer with Security and Cloud backgrounds.**
 As a Sales Engineer at Radware, you’ll need to be capable of leading technical sales activities and managing the customer technical relationship. You must possess the highest levels of both business and technical acumen, defining and architecting solutions that meet the business and technical requirements and striving to provide the right solution to our customers and prospects based on their technical expertise.
   

  

* Being part of the regional sales team and working hand in hand with the Sales Account Managers to formulate an account strategy using proven sales tools and sales methodology.
* Driving revenue and creating sales opportunities by managing the pre-sales technical process and evangelizing Radware technology to existing and prospective customers.
* Design solutions for customer's business requirements from the Radware product and service portfolio.
* Partnering with direct sales and executive sponsors to educate existing and prospective customers and partners about the superiority of Radware products and services. This includes conference calls, online meetings, site visits, presentations, technical evaluations, technical objection handling, proposals, and follow-up on all customer-related questions.
* Engaging and overseeing the development of customer proposals, including design and delivery, and providing a consultative approach based on Industry-wide and Radware expertise.
* Collaborate with Sales, Marketing, and other internal teams to ensure that customers get appropriate updates, upgrades and event-oriented information and solutions.
* Respond to Request for Information (RFI), Request for Proposals (RFPs), and Request for Quotes (RFQs) by providing fully documented, detailed solutions with the required technical information.
* Manage Demos and Proof of Concept (POCs).
* Compliance with pre-sales processes, including account activity tracking to drive business analysis and reporting.


****What you need:****
* 5+ years of experience in Network and Application Security, Pre-sales Engineering, or real-world use of database and/or Web application solutions (preferably with 3+ of these years as a Sales Engineer) for a security vendor or Reseller.
* Possess a solid understanding of networking and security equipment and architectures On-Premises or cloud-based, knowledge of Web applications, databases, security, and auditing environments.
* Solid knowledge of Routing, Switching, TCP/IP, HTTP, Load Balancing/Application Delivery Controllers, Reverse Proxies, Caching, CDN, Compression, (NG) Firewalls, Network & Application DDoS.
* Good knowledge of Application Security especially Api Security and Bot Management.
* Vendor and product knowledge of Akamai CDN, DDoS, WAF, Cisco ASA PIX FW, Citrix NetScaler, Checkpoint FW, Corero DDoS, F5 ADC, DDoS, WAF, Fortinet DDoS, FW, Imperva/Incapsula, Palo Alto preferable.
* Knowledge of Public cloud providers like AWS, Azure and GCP.
* High level of English


****How can you stand out:****
* Good presentation, speaking, and negotiation skills
* Independent and Self-Motivated
* Excellent Customer Service Skills
* BSc in Engineering, Computer Sciences, or equivalent


**Why you should join us:**
 Employees from more than 40 countries have chosen Radware as a place where they can belong.
   

  

 Radware has been recognized by Glassdoor and BDI as one of the World’s Best Places to Work, ranking among the top 100 companies across the globe in the IT category.
   

  

 Radware has also been named a Gold Winner for Application Security in the 2023 Globee Cybersecurity Awards, by Forrester a Leader in DDoS Protection, and has been named a Leader in WAF Market by Quadrant Knowledge Solutions.
   

  

 We are equally committed to our people. We strive to create a dynamic work environment that celebrates diversity, promotes equality, and thrives on the unique contributions of each individual.
   

  

 If you are ready to be part of a global-minded company that is inspired to create a better, safer future; and if and want to fight for the good guys and be at the forefront of helping companies protect their most critical assets from today’s cyber adversaries, then you’ve found the right fit at Radware.
   

  

**Primary Location**
 SE-Sweden
   

  

**Job**
 Technical Support

title: Embedded HW/SW Engineers for a Mission that Matters
description:
**Join the core team building the intelligence layer for the physical domain.** 




  





 We're hiring early core-team engineers in embedded to help us build and scale our hardware and software platforms. High autonomy, high ownership, and big upside.
 



  





 Freya develops intelligent sensors that connect the physical world. Affordable, scalable, and built for rapid iteration. Starting where the urgency is highest in security and defence, expanding into a broader platform to protect people and infrastructure.
 



  





 As our next
 **Embedded Hardware Engineer** 
 you'll design, prototype, and manufacture the next generation of Freya sensors.
 


* Own PCB design, layout, and review across multiple product lines
* Drive prototyping, bring-up, and DFM/DFT iterations
* Manage sourcing and relationships with manufacturing partners
* Help shape the hardware platform from the ground up
* Extra plus: RF engineering experience or interest



  





 As our next
 **Embedded Software Engineer** 
 you'll build the firmware and on-device intelligence that runs on every Freya sensor.
 


* Write firmware and application code in C, Rust, and Python
* Ship on embedded Linux with tight latency, power, and security constraints
* Build the on-device stack and connect devices to our cloud platform
* Help shape the device platform and toolchain
* Extra plus: Edge AI / ML experience



  





**What we look for** 



* AI-native approach
* NATO or Ukrainian citizenship
* Stockholm-based
* Fluent in English
* Extra plus: Background in security or defence



  





**Join us for a mission that matters.** 




  





 Apply for our roles on LinkedIn or drop us an email at hello@freyaindustries.com

title: German-speaking Sales Executive to Gothenburg, Sweden
description:
**We are looking for a German-speaking Sales Executive to join a fast-scaling tech team in Gothenburg, Sweden!** 




  





 This role offers a unique opportunity to shape a new market from scratch, working across the full sales cycle while contributing to the growth of a high-potential team. You will play a key part in the company's expansion into the German-speaking market, collaborating directly with leadership and gaining ownership from day one.
 



  





  





**About the company** 




 Our client is a Swedish logistics-tech company that empowers small businesses to ship smarter. By integrating pricing, booking, and tracking into a unified platform, they eliminate inefficiencies in traditional logistics workflows. Focused on seamless user experience and operational simplicity, they provide ambitious entrepreneurs with the tools to manage shipping without stress.
 



  





  





**What will you do?** 



* Identify, prospect, and qualify new customers in the German-speaking market
* Book, lead, and run engaging product demos and sales calls
* Convert leads into active customers and ensure a seamless onboarding experience
* Build lasting customer relationships and provide high-touch support
* Own and exceed individual sales KPIs
* Collaborate with the sales and product teams to provide feedback and shape team growth
* Represent the company at industry events and in direct customer interactions



  





  





**Candidate profile** 



* Energetic, driven, and passionate about connecting with people
* Structured and proactive with excellent multitasking abilities
* Resilient and motivated by turning objections into opportunities
* Prior sales experience, ideally in a fast-paced or tech-driven environment
* Comfortable working independently and contributing to a collaborative team culture
* Native-level German and fluent English communication skills
* Based in Gothenburg or willing to relocate
* Bonus: Background in logistics or SaaS/Tech, or experience in startups



  





**Relocation Package** 




 • Flight ticket to Gothenburg for you (and family, if applicable)
 



 • Transfer from airport to accommodation
 



 • 15,000 SEK net relocation support
 



 • Temporary housing support (with assistance finding an apartment)
 



 • Help with obtaining Swedish ID, bank account, insurance, and tax registration
 



 • Visa and work permit support
 



 • General orientation to healthcare, transportation, and local life
 



  





**Salary** 




 • Base salary: 25,000 SEK/month
 



 • Guaranteed commission (first 3 months): 10,000 SEK
 



 • On-target earnings (OTE): 50,000 SEK/month
 



 • High performer earnings: up to 75,000 SEK/month
 



  





**Benefits** 




 • Relocation support (as above)
 



 • Collaborative and growth-oriented work culture
 



 • Opportunity for professional growth within an international tech scale-up
 



  





  





 Do you want to own your market, build something new, and have fun doing it? Don’t miss this opportunity to be part of a fast-growing and dynamic team!

title: Functional consultant Dynamics 365 CE Stockholm
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
 Med över 50 000 experter globalt och som certifierad och managerad Microsoft Cloud Partner på högsta nivån, har vi kompetensen och specialiseringar att leverera hållbara, smarta lösningar som gör verklig skillnad. På Sopra Steria förenar vi teknik och syfte för att driva digital transformation med Azure OpenAI, Copilot, BI, Dynamics 365 och Power Platform. Tillsammans med våra kunder förenklar vi processer, stärker kundrelationer och skapar värde för både verksamhet och samhälle. Genom att tillämpa AI där det ger störst effekt hjälper vi organisationer att ta nästa steg i sin digitala resa.
   

  

 Rollen som funktionell konsult är bred och här jobbar du nära verksamheten och dina arbetsuppgifter kan till exempel inkludera anpassningar av systemet, framtagande av lösningsförslag, konfiguration, eller att på andra sätt hjälpa verksamheter framåt. Ofta arbetar vi också i en helhetsleverans tillsammans med kollegor från oss på Sopra Steria.
   

  

**Om Dig**
 Du är van att arbeta inom Microsoft Dynamics 365 CE och trivs med att skapa värde mot kund. Du har en förmåga att förstå företagsbehov och gillar att arbeta verksamhetsnära.
   

  

* Minst 4 års erfarenhet inom Dynamics 365 CE
* Kunna konfigurera i Dynamics 365 CRM (skapa tabeller, vyer, formulär etc.)
* Arbetat med tjänster inom Power Platform (low-code lösningar baserat på Power Apps och Power Automate)
* Erfarenhet och/eller intresse av att arbeta med Copilot Studio
* God kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Att jobba på Sopra Steria**
 Hos oss får du ett stabilt bolag med stora kunder och resurser, i kombination med entreprenörsanda och stark teamkänsla. Vi erbjuder utmanande uppdrag där du kan bidra tekniskt för att göra skillnad i samhället. Med kollektivavtal, marknadsmässiga löner, flexibilitet och en kultur präglad av kunskapsdelning och samarbete vill vi ge dig riktigt bra förutsättningar för att lyckas. Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss här.
   

  

**Ansök nu – vi ser fram emot att träffa dig!**
 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

 Rekryteringsprocessen består av tre intervjuer, personlighet- och logiktest, referenstagning och bakgrundskontroll. Denna kombination av urvalsmetoder ger oss en bredare och mer rättvis bild av dig som kandidat, samtidigt som det säkerställer att både dina tekniska och personliga styrkor kommer till sin rätt. För dig som kandidat innebär det en möjlighet att visa din kompetens och potential från flera perspektiv.
   

  

 Om du har frågor om tjänsten eller oss som bolag är du välkommen att kontakta Theresia Wiclander, theresia.wiclander@soprasteria.com

title: Data Engineer
description:
At
 **OMATEQ** 
 we specialize in providing highly skilled engineers to mid-sized companies with proprietary software. Our clients trust us because our consultants not only master technology but also understand business needs and know how to contribute effectively as part of the client’s team. With an average of 10 years of experience, our developers bring depth, reliability, and problem-solving ability to every engagement.
 



  





 We are now looking for a
 **Data Engineer** 
 to strengthen our team of experienced consultants. At OMATEQ, you will work in dynamic and challenging environments where your expertise meets innovation. You will help our clients design and build scalable data platforms, manage complex data pipelines, and deliver modern solutions that truly make an impact.
 



  









**Who Are You?** 




 With
 **5+ years of professional experience,** 
 you bring a strong background in data engineering and the ability to design and deliver high-quality, scalable, and efficient data solutions.
 


* Strong experience in designing, developing, and maintaining data pipelines and ETL processes.
* Hands-on expertise with cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP), delivering scalable and cloud-native data solutions.
* Solid knowledge of data modeling, data lakes, and data warehouses.
* Skilled in programming with
 **Python** 
 ,
 **SQL** 
 , or
 **Scala** 
 for data processing and automation.
* Experience with data streaming and modeling tools such as Spark, Kafka, or dbt.
* Familiar with data governance, quality assurance, and security best practices. Comfortable collaborating with cross-functional teams (data scientists, analysts, developers).
* A friendly mindset and a desire to be in an environment where what matters is how you treat people and what you deliver.
* Fluency in Swedish, both spoken and written.



  





**The Environment** 



* Be part of a consulting company renowned for craftsmanship and deep expertise.
* Work on meaningful, cutting-edge projects in a variety of industries.
* Hybrid work model with flexibility and a purpose-driven culture.



  





 Ready to put your skills to work where they truly make a difference? Send us your resume and let’s start this journey together 🚀
